svg.title: Arcsine and semicircle densities on the interval from minus two to two
svg.desc: The arcsine density is U-shaped and diverges at both endpoints. The semicircle density is largest at zero and vanishes at both endpoints.
svg.text: Two limiting spectral densities on the same support
Arcsine puts more mass near the edges; semicircle puts more mass in the bulk.
The arcsine curve is clipped vertically; its density tends to infinity as x approaches either endpoint.
